_comment: Server-side dashboard config. Copy to ~/.config/script-dashboard/server-config.json and edit. See CLAUDE.md.

_schema.artifactRoots: Array of { root, archive } pairs. The dashboard's artifact endpoints only accept paths that resolve inside one of these roots; anything else returns 400. 'root' is where emitted artifacts live on disk; 'archive' is where the Archive button moves them. Order matters: roots are checked in order and the first match wins, so list the most specific roots first when they're nested inside broader ones.

artifactRoots._comment: Example: a narrow Tasks root with its own Archive (typical for slack-saved-sync, meeting-tasks-extractor). Listed first so Task Notes archive to Work Log/Archive, not the broader Resources archive.
Example: a broader Resources root (covers clippings, drafts/reminders inbox fillings, connection-enricher targets). Files outside Work Log/Tasks still match here.
